title: Olive
description: A drought-resistant Mediterranean tree known for its fruit and oil production.
habitat: Dry, rocky areas with hot summers and mild, wet winters
adaptation: Thick, leathery leaves reduce water loss and help survive drought

title: Lavender
description: An aromatic shrub valued for its fragrance and purple flowers.
habitat: Dry sunny slopes with well-drained soil
adaptation: Aromatic oils and narrow leaves protect against heat and reduce water loss

title: Rosemary
description: A fragrant evergreen shrub commonly used in cooking and medicine.
habitat: Coastal and rocky dry areas with full sun
adaptation: Small waxy leaves reduce water loss in dry environments

title: Orchid
description: A diverse family of flowering plants often found growing on trees in tropical forests.
habitat: Warm, humid forests with high rainfall
characteristics: Often grows on trees instead of soil
adaptation: Epiphytic growth helps orchids reach light without competing on the forest floor

title: Banana Plant
description: A large tropical plant known for its broad leaves and fruit clusters.
habitat: Warm, wet tropical environments with rich soil
adaptation: Fast growth and large leaves allow efficient light capture in humid climates

title: Mahogany
description: A tall tropical hardwood tree valued for its strong wood.
adaptation: Grows very tall to compete for sunlight in dense forests

title: Fir
description: An evergreen conifer commonly found in cool mountain regions.
adaptation: Needle leaves help tolerate cold temperatures and reduce moisture loss

title: Moss
description: A small non-vascular plant that forms green mats in moist environments.
habitat: Damp, shaded forests and moist surfaces
adaptation: Absorbs water directly and helps retain moisture in ecosystems

title: Rhododendron
description: A flowering shrub known for its vibrant clustered blooms.
habitat: Cool, humid forests with acidic soil
adaptation: Thrives in moist, acidic soil and supports pollinators

title: Cactus
description: A desert plant adapted to survive in extremely dry conditions.
habitat: Arid deserts with very low rainfall
adaptation: Stores water and minimizes water loss in dry environments

title: Aloe
description: A succulent plant known for its soothing gel and drought resistance.
habitat: Hot, dry regions with sandy or rocky soil
adaptation: Stores water in leaves to survive long dry periods

title: Yucca
description: A hardy plant adapted to dry and semi-arid environments.
adaptation: Tolerates drought and poor soils with strong roots and tough leaves
